payload.title: Scaffold pi-ralph package and run ledger
Render resumable run records and dashboards
Add fresh-context launch and resume adapters
Expose Ralph command, tools, and guidance

payload.text: A delegated isolated task created `packages/pi-ralph/package.json`, `extensions/index.ts`, and the core `paths.ts`, `models.ts`, and `store.ts` files. The store was verified against a fresh temp workspace to initialize the ledger and create/read/list a run with the expected artifact skeleton.

payload.verificationNote: Implemented `packages/pi-ralph` foundation files plus workspace wiring: package metadata, README, LICENSE, extension lifecycle hooks, durable `.loom/ralph/` ledger initialization, core path/model/store code, and root `package.json`/`README.md` integration. Verified through package test suite, targeted lint, and workspace typecheck.

Implemented store-backed run reading, packet compilation, run markdown rendering, append-only iteration history, and dashboard views. Verified by `packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts`, `index.test.ts`, and `tools.test.ts`, plus workspace typecheck.

Implemented explicit run/iteration statuses, policy snapshots, waiting states, launch metadata, and continuation decision logic with deterministic reason codes for verifier blocks, critique blocks, iteration limits, completion, and runtime failures. Verified by `packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts` and `tools.test.ts`, plus workspace typecheck.

Integrated critique linkage and verifier summaries into durable Ralph state, including blocking critique handling, wait states, linked critique refs, and packet/dashboard visibility. Verified by `packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts`, `tools.test.ts`, and workspace typecheck.

Implemented fresh-context packet generation, durable launch descriptors, prepare/resume semantics, and subprocess runtime adapters for launch/resume flows. Verified by `packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/runtime.test.ts`, `store.test.ts`, `tools.test.ts`, and workspace typecheck.

Added `/ralph` command handling, `ralph_*` tools, prompt guidance, and extension lifecycle registration while keeping Ralph distinct from critique and other Loom layers. Verified by `packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/index.test.ts`, `commands.test.ts`, `tools.test.ts`, prompt-guidance tests, and workspace typecheck.

Added six focused package tests covering store durability, command flows, tool flows, runtime spawn behavior, prompt guidance, and extension registration. Verified with `npx vitest run packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/prompt-guidance.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/runtime.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/tools.test.ts`, targeted Biome checks, and workspace `npm run typecheck`.

payload.text: After an external review surfaced correctness gaps, `packages/pi-ralph/extensions/domain/store.ts` and `extensions/commands/ralph.ts` were updated so review-gated runs cannot be relaunched prematurely, cancelled interactive launches append a cancelled iteration instead of leaving fake in-flight state, and manual approval waits remain operator-gated.

`packages/pi-ralph/__tests__/store.test.ts` and `commands.test.ts` now cover manual-approval gating, blocked prepareLaunch behavior, and cancellation rollback so the reviewed edge cases remain enforced by tests.

payload.title: Standardize persisted Loom artifact paths as repo-relative
Eliminate git churn from generated dashboard timestamps
Resolve critique/docs/ralph subprocess extension roots from package location
Define and enforce commit policy for `.loom` artifacts
Correct root README constitutional memory path
Update `pi-ralph` README to match shipped functionality
Normalize Loom tool-returned path fields to repo-relative values

payload.verificationNote: Implemented repo-relative path storage/output across the affected Loom layers. Verified with `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm test`.
Removed volatile dashboard generation timestamps and verified stable dashboard shapes through updated tests plus `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm test`.
Runtime helpers now resolve extension roots from package/module location. Verified with focused runtime tests and the full workspace `npm test`, plus `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint`.

Documented `.loom` commit policy in README/`pi-ralph` README and enforced runtime-local launch descriptor ignores in `.gitignore`. Verified docs changes with `npm run lint` and full workspace tests/typecheck.
Corrected root constitutional path guidance and fixed remaining package store references. Verified with `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test`.
Updated `packages/pi-ralph/README.md` to match shipped command/tool/runtime behavior and artifact policy. Verified with `npm run lint` and full workspace tests.

Normalized surfaced path fields to repo-relative values across ticketing, research, specs, initiatives, plans, critique, docs, and Ralph. Verified with package tests plus full workspace `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm test`.
